title: Koyamacalia hastata
taxonomy: Koyamacalia hastata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, which is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. This plant belongs to the genus Koyamacalia, which is a small group of plants native to East Asia. The genus Koyamacalia is closely related to the genus Cremanium and is sometimes considered to be a subgenus of Cremanium. Koyamacalia hastata is further classified as a member of the subgenus Koyamacalia, which is a distinct group within the Asteraceae family. The classification of Koyamacalia hastata is based on its morphological characteristics and molecular analysis.
